_doc: 10 sample CDS-style queries hitting all 8 retrieval primitives. Each query lists what a clinician/student wants and which primitive should answer. The phase7_run harness invokes the corresponding menu function and writes envelopes to brain/phase7_report.md. Target: every query returns a non-empty data block; provenance (claim_ids, sources) present where applicable; current/superseded flags accurate.

queries.intent: What do we know about artemisinin? Confirm node exists, neighbors enumerated, citations resolve.
Same for chloroquine. Should surface superseded/resistance edges.
2-hop ego network around malaria — drugs, resistance, populations.
How does the brain connect chloroquine to resistance? Path should pass through Plasmodium falciparum / region nodes.
High-certainty, current findings restricted to Greater Mekong. Geo qualifier exercise.
Pregnancy-safe options — firewall test (no derivative; only direct claims).
Sources newer than 2020. Exercises Source.publication_date sort.
Open questions + contradictions surfaced. Should include hydroxychloroquine + vitamin D contradicting topics.
Bundle 10 highest-grade claim IDs and request their evidence pack — full provenance round-trip.
Greedy-modularity community for malaria — should cluster malaria/drug/resistance/pregnancy nodes together.
